will occur at night,
and if Diurnal at daytime. It is understood that if there are
planels in the Lagna, they would influence the effects.
One dies with many others, if there arc many planets in the
4th, and the lord of the ascendant is conjoined with that of the
Sth house.
One would die along with one's wife or son, if the lords of the
ascendant and the Sth house, are conjoined with that of the
7th or Sth house, as the case may be.
If the lord of the Lagna be in a watery sign or Amsa being
aspected by the Moon and Venus, and if the Sth and 12th
houses are occupied by malefics. death will be in water.
If the birth takes place during the period of Visa Ghatis
and if the Sth house be occupied by a malefic, death would
be through poison, fire or weapons.
If the Moon be in the Fatal degree in the ascendant, Sth or
12th house, it would be through water or machinery.
If the lord of the Sth house be posited in a Navamsa which
is termed Visa, and be conjoined with a malefic, death would
